summary: First testing iteration. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests PASSED (auth, services, availability, bookings, waitlist auto-notify, admin CRUD, blacklist enforcement, payments). Frontend: landing, login (admin -> /admin/diary), admin diary/services/clients tabs, customer register, service browse, book screen with calendar+slots, booking creation via UI (POST /api/bookings -> 200, redirect to /bookings showing CONFERMATA), profile with share link all render and function correctly on mobile viewport (375x667). Console has minor React-Native-web warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' triggered on customer home & book screens (likely stray '.' in JSX interpolation). Biometric/Google/Stripe UI buttons exist but weren't exercised (integration requires real device / valid Stripe key). No deprecated Expo packages detected (no expo-av, expo-barcode-scanner, expo-background-fetch in code).

ui_bugs.issue: React Native Web warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>'. Repeated 3x per page load. Likely a stray '.' or empty interpolation rendered outside a <Text> component. Non-blocking but should be fixed. Check separator patterns like `{a} . {b}` where a value may be falsy leaving a raw '.'

action_items: Fix the 'Unexpected text node' console warning: audit JSX for stray '.', ' ', ',' or similar characters placed directly inside <View> outside a <Text> component. Common source is separator patterns like `{duration}min · {price}` when one variable is temporarily undefined, or hardcoded dots between icons.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 692 lines - approaching the 700 line guideline; consider splitting into modules (auth.py, bookings.py, admin.py, waitlist.py) for maintainability.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking, still functional).
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection in every query - good.
All endpoints use /api prefix and require Depends(get_user_from_token)/require_admin appropriately - RBAC verified via 403 tests.
Blacklist correctly enforced at both login (403) and booking creation (403); admin cancel triggers waitlist auto-notify via asyncio background task (verified working).
Stripe & Resend integrations are optional and gracefully degrade when keys are missing.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed users and one TEST_ service via automated tests. Admin & 8 base services are auto-seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully passing (21/21). Frontend flows validated on mobile viewport 375x667. The only issue is a low-severity React-Native-web 'Unexpected text node' warning on customer screens. Biometric/Google Auth/Stripe payment sheet require real device or valid keys and were skipped in automated tests (buttons render fine).
rca_of_issue: React Native Web 'Unexpected text node: .' warning: RN Web disallows raw text nodes inside <View>. When you write JSX like `<View>{condition && '.'} </View>` or accidentally have whitespace/punctuation between JSX elements, the renderer complains. Fix: wrap any literal text in a <Text> component or ensure separators live inside a <Text> parent, e.g. `<Text>{duration}min · {formatCents(price)}</Text>` (already correct in book.tsx) - check home.tsx service card layout for a similar pattern with a bare period.
